case_title: TWO GUYS LLC VS. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2025 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO FEB-20-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA.
